sanskrit:
पश्यादित्यान्वसून् रुद्रानश्विनौ मरुतस्तथा।
बहून्यदृष्टपूर्वाणि पश्याश्चर्याणि भारत॥
transliteration: paśyādityān vasūn rudrān aśvinau marutas tathā | bahūny adṛṣṭa-pūrvāṇi paśyāścaryāṇi bhārata ||
literal_meaning: Behold the Ādityas, Vasus, Rudras, Aśvins, Maruts, and many wonders never seen before, O Bhārata.
contextual_meaning: Arjuna is invited to witness the full spectrum of latent psychic powers and archetypal forces within consciousness—realms he has never consciously accessed.
psychological_state: Pre-awe anticipatory expansion; mind preparing to accommodate the previously unthinkable.
trigger_scenario: The moment before a breakthrough therapy session when the client senses unknown memories or parts-of-self about to surface.
anchor_text: See every hidden power within you waiting to awaken.
